description: DefiLlama DeFi analytics: protocol/chain TVL, token prices, stablecoin circulation, yield/APY pools, DEX volumes, and fees/revenue — all from the free open API, no API key or auth setup needed. SETUP NOTE: the list_protocols, list_pools, and get_protocol actions stream ~10 MB API dumps and need WASM_DEFAULT_FUEL_LIMIT=2000000000 (or higher) in the IronClaw env — the default 500M fuel limit is not enough; all other actions run on stock settings.
